name: Amaretto Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the pecans separately and then add them to a food processor with the chocolate wafer crumbs.
2. Sift in the confectioners' sugar gradually until the mixture holds together as a firm ball.
3. If the mixture is too moist, cover it and refrigerate overnight; this will help reduce moisture.
4. Shape the dough into small balls and roll them in additional chopped pecans.
5. Store the finished balls in a tightly sealed container.
Yield: Not nearly enough.
Vicki's notes:
One Christmas Eve I had to work, but I took a break to visit a bookstore with an open house. During those moments of downtime, I enjoyed these morsels immensely!
These treats are equally enjoyed and requested by my friends. Although some have experimented with other liqueurs like bourbon, the original combination remains unmatched.
For substitution, Oreos can be used in place of the chocolate wafer crumbs, along with 2/3 cup confectioners' sugar; omit any cookie filling as it is merely a dusting of sugar.
